# Linux Freelancing Training & IT Support in the United Kingdom 🇬🇧

School of Freelancing delivers live, online instructor-led Linux freelancing training and remote Linux/IT support to students and businesses across the United Kingdom — no local office required, priced in USD.

## United Kingdom Training & Support Overview

### Training for UK-Based Freelancers

Learn hands-on Linux server administration, DevOps, VoIP, and AI-platform skills through live instructor-led sessions scheduled to work with UK time zones, then apply them on Guru, Freelancer, and Upwork.

[Browse all training →](/freelancing-training/)

### Remote IT Support for UK Businesses

Get fast, secure remote support for Linux servers, cloud infrastructure, VoIP systems, and AI platforms — billed in USD with clear, fixed-scope pricing.

[Browse all support services →](/linux-ai-services/)

## Why Work With Us From the United Kingdom

- All training and support is delivered online — no travel or on-site visit needed
- Pricing quoted and billed in USD, matching what you see on our training and support pages
- 24/7 response on Telegram and WhatsApp, with an average reply time of about an hour
- Flexible scheduling to overlap with UK business hours across time zones
- Training and support relevant to the UK's growing freelance and remote-tech market

## Frequently Asked Questions

Do you have a local office in the United Kingdom? +

No. School of Freelancing delivers all training and support online, worldwide — there's no local office anywhere, including the United Kingdom.

What currency is training and support priced in for the United Kingdom? +

Everything is priced and billed in USD regardless of your location, matching the prices shown on our training and support pages.

Can training be scheduled around time zones in the United Kingdom? +

Yes. Live instructor-led sessions are scheduled flexibly to overlap with your local business hours.

How do I get started from the United Kingdom? +

Message us on Telegram or WhatsApp to pick a training program or support service, and we'll confirm scheduling.
